A suite of //...// attendants, led by //...//, cornered, clubbed, and tied an //...// //...// //...// to a willow tree after
a long exhausting chase with //...//.
They called //...// to the site and suggested that he shoot it. He refused to shoot the //...// himself, deeming this unsportsmanlike,

702508107380781056:
[This Area Has an Automatic Visitor Recognition System]

[We detect that your Shelter posses {one} --- fax]

[To be granted access, please follow the details in the -- fax]
702509198889676800:
Warehouse Manager T.,

We have increased the security measures around  the office grounds due to a recent series of break-ins. The door to your office had to be completely renewed and with it - the lock.

Please pick up your new set of keys at my Workshop. I'm there every day from 7 to 14.

-Senior Repairman D.
702510894537732096: Hey Bob! Ready for another one? ;) "My ancestors always steamed up when working hard, and whistled in the times of joy. What were they?" -Steve
702511794094305280:
Locked out? Huh, strange....
Returning the favor after you hid my car keys, again.

Triangles are my favorite shape:
01010011 01110100 01110010 01100001 01110111 01100010 01100101 01110010 01110010 01111001
46 72 6F 73 74
C200 210 111 002 110 012

Enjoy, Steve
You'll never find it.

-Bob
702513563079766016:
The shipment #68924 is delayed till tomorrow. Therefore, there's no need to keep this area unlocked for the rest of the day. I left the key at the break room. Pick it up before 6 bells tomorrow to ensure the shipment is received on schedule.

-Harbormaster C.
702515335378726912:
To all employees,

This restroom is undergoing extensive pipe maintenance and will be unavailable until further notice.
Please, use the next door restroom until then.

-Office Manager G.
702530816735145984:
You! Did you come here looking for that Restroom key? Why did you even think it would be here?
No matter. Want to know something interesting? That restroom was never out of order. Inventory Clerk just wanted it whole for himself... Thus, you know where to find that key.

-Good Samaritan
